mentions_legales.label: Dénomination sociale (nom/raison sociale)
mentions_legales.quote: Slack Technologies, LLC or Slack Technologies Limited

mentions_legales.label: Forme juridique
mentions_legales.quote: Slack Technologies, LLC, a U.S. company based in San Francisco, California

mentions_legales.label: Adresse de l'établissement / siège social
mentions_legales.quote: 50 Fremont Street, San Francisco, CA, 94105, United States

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Identité du Responsable de Traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Slack Technologies, LLC, a U.S. company based in San Francisco, California is the controller of Other Information and a processor of Customer Data relating to Authorized Users who use Workspaces established for Customers in the US and Canada.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Coordonnées du DPO
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: To communicate with our Data Protection Officer, please email dpo@slack.com.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Types de données collectées + raison
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: - **Workspace and account information**: To create or update a Workspace account, you or our Customer (e.g. your employer) supply Slack with an email address, phone number, password, domain, and/or other account set up details

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Base légale du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Slack primarily relies on its legitimate interests, described above, to process your Personal Data.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Caractère obligatoire/facultatif + conséquences
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Generally, no one is under a statutory or contractual obligation to provide any Customer Data or Other Information (collectively, “**Information**”). However, certain Information is collected automatically and, if some Information, such as Workspace setup details, is not provided, we may be unable to provide the Services.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Durée de conservation des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Slack may retain Other Information pertaining to you for as long as necessary for the purposes described in this Privacy Policy (such as to provide the Services, including any optional features you use, and to provide customer support).

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Destinataires des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: - **Third-Party service providers and partners.**We may engage third-party companies or individuals as service providers or business partners to process Information and support our business.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Sécurité des données (art. 32 RGPD)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Slack takes security of data very seriously. Slack works hard to protect Information you provide from loss, misuse, and unauthorized access or disclosure.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : catégories concernées
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: - **Third-Party data**: Slack may receive data about organizations, industries, lists of companies that are customers, Website visitors, marketing campaigns and other matters related to our business from parent corporation(s), affiliates and subsidiaries, our partners, or others that we use to make our own information better or more useful.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : source des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Slack may receive data about organizations, industries, lists of companies that are customers, Website visitors, marketing campaigns and other matters related to our business from parent corporation(s), affiliates and subsidiaries, our partners, or others that we use to make our own information better or more useful.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'introduire une plainte (CNIL)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Subject to applicable law, you also have the right to (i) restrict Slack’s use of Other Information that constitutes your Personal Data and (ii) lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit de rectification
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Subject to any exemptions provided by law, you may have the right to request access to your personal information, as well as to seek to update, delete, or correct this information.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'accès
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Subject to any exemptions provided by law, you may have the right to request access to your personal information, as well as to seek to update, delete, or correct this information.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à l'effacement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Subject to any exemptions provided by law, you may have the right to request access to your personal information, as well as to seek to update, delete, or correct this information.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la limitation du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Subject to applicable law, you also have the right to (i) restrict Slack’s use of Other Information that constitutes your Personal Data

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'opposition
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Where we rely on legitimate interests to process your Personal Data, you can object to that processing by contacting us as described in the “Contacting Slack” section below.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Date de dernière mise à jour de la politique

cookies.label: Présence d'une politique cookies
cookies.quote: Slack uses a variety of cookies and similar technologies in our Websites and Services to help us collect Other Information. For more details about how we use these technologies, and your opt-out controls and other options, please visit our Cookie Policy.

cookies.label: Retrait du consentement simple et à tout moment
Information sur le Responsable de Traitement
cookies.quote: Slack Technologies, LLC or Slack Technologies Limited

cookies.label: Finalité des cookies (claire et complète)
cookies.quote: Slack uses Other Information for the following purposes: *To provide, update, maintain and protect our Services, Websites and business.*

cookies.label: Détail des finalités (2e niveau)
cookies.quote: - improve search functionality by using Other Information to help determine and rank the relevance of content, channels or expertise to an Authorized User;

cookies.label: Détail des types de cookies déposés

transferts_hors_ue.label: Existence de transferts hors UE + destinataires
transferts_hors_ue.quote: Slack may transfer your Personal Data to countries other than the one in which you live, including transfers to the United States.

transferts_hors_ue.label: Stockage cloud hors UE + localisation serveurs
transferts_hors_ue.quote: we need to share information we collect globally. We carry out necessary transfers outside the European Economic Area, including to Australia, Canada, Japan, India, South Korea, and the United States, to provide, update, maintain and protect our Services, Websites and business.
